title: Steadfast
description: This modpack is designed to deliver the complete modded optimization based Minecraft experience without the need for intensive research and information overload that often accompanies it.
body:
![Steadfast Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5589c5245cd030f5358d8a1dce8749bf6eecfdfb.jpeg)

![Steadfast Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5850f018144c758d71086fbcffec58bb58a67660.png)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/829799190510829569?label=Discord&logo=discord&color=7289DA)](discord.gg/cBhy7hzrTB) [![YouTube Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCrapLlygACxb1s_zlhxMbJA?style=flat&logo=youtube&label=subscribers&color=red)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrapLlygACxb1s_zlhxMbJA?sub_confirmation=1) [![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/steadfast?label=version&logo=modrinth&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/steadfast)

This modpack is designed to deliver the complete modded optimization based Minecraft experience without the need for intensive research and information overload that often accompanies it.

Our focus is to provide an uniquely tailored in-game learning experience for players interested in exploring mods and their features at their own pace enabling them to define their own gameplay experience.

It offers a one-size-fits-all experience with a versatile yet structured gameplay around optimization of everything in the game, catering to a wide range of preferences.

Despite its wealth of content, its low system requirements ensures accessibility for all players so no one is left out.

![Steadfast Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5850f018144c758d71086fbcffec58bb58a67660.png)

<details>
<summary>Minimum Requirements</summary>

```
OS: Windows 11+ | Linux | MacOS
Processor: 2 CPU threads
Memory: 2 GB RAM
Graphics: 2 GB video memory
Java Version: Java 17+
Storage: 5 GB available space
```
</details>
<details>
<summary>Recommended Requirements</summary>

```
OS: Windows 11+ | Linux | MacOS
Processor: 4 CPU threads
Memory: 8 GB RAM
Graphics: 4 GB video memory
Java Version: Java 17+
Storage: 15 GB available space
```
</details>

![Steadfast Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5850f018144c758d71086fbcffec58bb58a67660.png)

**Performance**

Steadfast is faster than OptiFine, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. The bundled mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.

**Works Everywhere**

Steadfast does not include content mods, so you can play on any world or server. While you can use any game launcher to play the pack, we recommend and provide support for specific ones that offer the best experience.

**Built on Fabric**

Steadfast uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods. You can use the modpack as a base to add your favorite mods to.

**Open Development**

Steadfast is open-source, and so are all of its mods. We welcome user suggestions and collaborate with mod developers to create a better user experience for everyone.

**Helpful Community**

We have a growing community of steadfast academy members who enjoy playing the pack and helping each other.

![Steadfast Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5850f018144c758d71086fbcffec58bb58a67660.png)

**Modpack Contents**

This modpack will allow clients to connect to servers that only run Cobblemon, Fabric API, and Architectury.
If you want to get any of these mods for personal use, please download them from their original pages to support their authors.
